samples.xml_description:
<module id="pe">
    <description>Implement a Multiplying Accumulator for 32bit integer.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset signal. Defined as 1 for reset and 0 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="c" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit output representing the accumulated result.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="WIDTH" value="32">Width of input operands.</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>Implement a Multiplying Accumulator for 32bit integer using registers and an always block. The module should multiply the input operands and accumulate the result into an output register.</implementation>
    <task>
        <description>Calculate the product of input operands.</description>
        <input>None.</input>
        <output>None.</output>
        <implementation>assign product = a * b;</implementation>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Update the accumulator register.</description>
        <input>None.</input>
        <output>None.</output>
        <implementation>
            <step>Set the initial value of the accumulator register.</step>
            <step>Update the accumulator register by adding the product to its current value.</step>
        </implementation>
    </task>
</module>
